scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/protocol/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/config/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/testkit/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/edge/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/agent/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/web/tsconfig.json
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test
